channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Pebblebee’s Halo can help track lost items and keep you safe, and it’s on sale for $50
item.description: If you’re planning to travel this summer, both a Bluetooth tracker and a personal safety device can come in handy, especially if you’ll be exploring on your own. The Pebblebee Halo combines those two gadgets into one, and it’s currently on sale for $49.99 ($10 off) at Amazon, which is the best price we’ve seen. […]

item.title: ROG NUC 16 Edition 20 : la RTX 5090 débarque dans un mini PC transparent
item.description: Pour les 20 ans de sa marque ROG, Asus enferme une RTX 5090 et jusqu'à 128 Go de RAM dans un mini PC de trois litres, sous un boîtier semi-transparent doré. Joli sur la photo, beaucoup moins sur la fiche d'évolutivité.

item.title: From the stage to the future: Where are Startup Battlefield’s alumni now?
item.description: We wanted to show you what happens after the confetti falls. We checked in with some of our recent alumni, many of whom have sat down with us on Build Mode: The Founder Survival Guide, TechCrunch's podcast for founders at every stage.

item.title: Florida sues OpenAI, Sam Altman, in first-of-its-kind lawsuit over violent incidents
item.description: The lawsuit partially revolves around a shooting at Florida State University last year, and ChatGPT's alleged role in the incident.

item.title: This could be Windows’ M1 moment — but expect it to cost a ton
item.description: Nvidia's announcement that it's getting into the consumer laptop chip space with RTX Spark is huge. Apple has proved for years that Arm-based chips can perform incredibly well while also delivering great battery life - at least on the Mac. In the Windows world, performance hasn't fully matched up under Qualcomm chips, mostly in the […]

item.title: Gemini’s new AI agent is about as good as Google’s demo
item.description: Google's new "24/7" AI agent, Gemini Spark, can be shockingly good at doing things on your behalf. But I'm not sure it's worth the financial cost and potential privacy tradeoffs. The company gave me access to Spark last week. Google advertises Spark as an AI agent that can take on tasks and work on them […]

item.title: Ninja has solved the biggest, most disgusting problem with home coffee makers, and as a barista, I can't believe nobody thought of it earlier
item.description: Automatic espresso machines can easily become a breeding ground for mold, but the new Ninja AutoBarista Pro has a case fan to stop that from happening.

item.title: Asus used 'feedback from esports pros' to make new 24-inch OLED — and it looks like the perfect monitor for competitive gamers
item.description: 'We can't wait to get this absolute weapon into the hands of gamers everywhere': Asus unveils 24-inch OLED monitor with 540Hz refresh rate.

item.title: Meta's AI support chatbot made it ridiculously easy for hackers to take over Instagram accounts
item.description: Meta says it's working on securing accounts that were affected by a hack.

item.title: Randy Pitchford says his friend found an unannounced Pixel Watch 5 in the sea
item.description: Our first look at the Pixel Watch 5 may have emerged from a truly unexpected place

item.title: ‘The smartest thing a celebrity has done’: Dua Lipa turns her jetsetter meme into a Google Maps collab
item.description: The pop star’s wanderlust has become a running joke within certain social media circles. Now everyone else can literally follow in her footsteps. As anyone following Dua Lipa on social media knows, a new photo dump from the singer can only mean one thing: a destination filled with midnight food excursions, aesthetic scenery, and equally Instagrammable looks. ...

item.title: A California bill that preserves access to video games achieves its first victory
item.description: California lawmakers are progressing a bill to preserve access to video games.

item.title: Meta’s own AI was exploited to hijack Instagram accounts
item.description: Meta's AI support chatbot helped hackers hijack Instagram accounts, as reported earlier by 404 Media. In a video shared on Telegram, a hacker shows how they could take over an account by asking Meta's chatbot to switch the email associated with someone else's profile and then reset the password. The issue, which Meta says has […]

item.title: The Streets of Rage movie has new writers and a director
item.description: Pat Casey and Josh Miller, the pair behind the Sonic the Hedgehog trilogy, are penning the script for the Streets of Rage movie.

item.title: Casey Neistat’s guide to posting every day
item.description: Some news: The Vergecast is now a daily podcast! Starting today, we'll be posting every weekday, with even more gadgets and rankings and conversations and feelings and podcasts-within-podcasts. We're excited for all the ways this new schedule lets us tell new kinds of stories, experiment with new tech and new formats, and involve you even […]

item.title: OpenAI Codex tool with over 29,000 downloads linked to malicious npm supply chain attack stealing authentication tokens
item.description: A tool started benign and turned sour after a little while, stealing tokens and granting persistent access.

item.title: Texas Instruments had plans for personal computer domination - a price war nearly brought it to ruin
item.description: Texas Instruments ended up in a brutal price war that nearly brought it to the brink
